title: The Builders Who Figure This Out First Will Be Impossible to Catch. Why You Need an Identity Shift.
source: AI News & Strategy Daily | Nate B Jones
executive_summary: The strategic implication is that AI advantage now comes from systems thinking, not prompt skill; leaders must manage agents like an engineering manager, set clear missions, and shift work from pre-thinking to guided execution [source](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5Di6o6zuMLc). The most consequential figure is the move to 10x and 100x capable models, which makes **Driving Efficiency** the key Executive Core Qualification because throughput now depends on cognitive architecture, not individual craft [source](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5Di6o6zuMLc).
